name: Definite_Array_Strat

generic_instantiations.name: Strat
generic_instantiations.code:
package Strat is new Definite_Strategy
  (Value, Value_Tree, Impl.Node, Impl.Create);

formals.name: Input_Strat
formals.code:
with package Input_Strat is new Definite_Strategy
  (Value => Elt_Type, others => <>);

formals.name: Value
formals.code: type Value is array (Index_Type) of Elt_Type;

formals.name: Value_Tree
formals.code: with package Value_Tree is new Definite_Value_Tree (Value);
